name: Adders & Discounts
author: Kevin
description: Exploring adders and discounts that apply to products, stand alone, and net adjustments

name: Text Variables
author: Kevin
description: Exploring a model where text variables are scoped to just two states: pre-design and post-design. If a user needs to isolate a specific scenario (e.g. energy efficiency measures only), they'd create a separate design and drop in that design's post-design variable.

versions.label: Pre-design/post-design with variable parameters and conditional descriptions
